text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 Accompanying IDF engineering forces across the border in Syria, an i24NEWS reporter shares new details on a "permanent fortification project" in Qunaitra: "These are bulldozers carrying out a project called the New East. It is a massive trench that essentially runs parallel to the border – a ditch and an embankment that you cannot cross. It is not passable by vehicle, and even by foot, it is very, very difficult." Asked whether this repeats past concepts like before October 7, which failed, the response was: “Barrier is not a dirty word; a barrier is a good thing. There must be a serious barrier. Not a fence that can be breached in five minutes with a shovel. This lesson – that we must defend forward, ahead of our communities – is a central lesson from October, and here in Syria, we are actively implementing it. There are ten security outposts in the Golan Heights and the Hermon, located beyond the fence, to protect the communities and prevent enemy entrenchment,” he added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 一名 i24NEWS 记者随同以色列国防军工程部队越过叙利亚边境，分享了关于库奈特拉“永久防御工程”的新细节：“这些推土机正在执行一个名为‘新东方’的项目。这是一条巨大的战壕，基本上与边境平行——这是一条你无法跨越的沟渠和路堤。车辆无法通行，即使是步行，也非常、非常困难。”当被问及这是否重蹈了 10 月 7 日之前失败的旧观念时，回应是：“屏障不是一个贬义词；屏障是件好事。必须有一个严肃的屏障。而不是那种用铲子五分钟就能突破的围栏。这个教训——即我们必须在我们的社区前方进行防御——是 10 月份的一个核心教训，在这里的叙利亚，我们正在积极实施它。在戈兰高地和黑门山有十个安全哨所，位于围栏之外，以保护社区并防止敌人扎根，”他补充道。 @wfwitness

text: 🇸🇴 / 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Somalia may restrict access to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait for countries that undermine the country’s territorial integrity, its ambassador to Ethiopia and permanent representative to the African Union, Abdullahi Warfa, said on X. "Any country interfering in Somalia’s internal affairs and compromising its territorial integrity and sovereignty will face repercussions, including potential restrictions on access to the Bab el-Mandeb Strait,” he stressed. The diplomat did not specify which countries he was referring to, but the statements are clearly aimed primarily at Israel, which recognized the semi-autonomous region of Somaliland as an independent and sovereign state late last year. 🐻 Yemenis are just sitting by the river... Well, Red sea, and waiting for the corpses to start washing ashore. They won't need to lift a finger to finalize their last year's humiliation of the Empire - the Empire is pretty much doing it to itself. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇴 / 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 索马里驻埃塞俄比亚大使兼驻非盟常驻代表阿卜杜拉希·瓦法（Abdullahi Warfa）在 X 上表示，索马里可能会限制那些破坏该国领土完整的国家进入曼德海峡。“任何干涉索马里内政并损害其领土完整和主权的国家都将面临后果，包括可能被限制进入曼德海峡，”他强调。这位外交官没有具体说明他指的是哪些国家，但这些声明显然主要针对以色列，以色列在去年年底承认了半自治地区索马里兰为一个独立主权国家。 🐻 也门人正坐在河边……好吧，是红海边，等着尸体开始被冲上岸。他们不需要动一根手指就能完成去年对帝国的羞辱——帝国几乎是在自取灭亡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Ebrahim Azizi, head of Iran's National Security and Foreign Policy Commission: The time has come to comply with the new Maritime Regime of the Strait of Hormuz. These regulations are determined by Iran, not by social media posts! Under this new system, only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls. If the U.S. attempts to create any disturbance for Iranian ships, this situation can easily be changed. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗国家安全与外交政策委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ebrahim Azizi）：现在是遵守霍尔木兹海峡新海事制度的时候了。这些规定由伊朗决定，而不是由社交媒体帖子决定！根据这一新制度，只有获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。如果美国试图对伊朗船只制造任何干扰，这种情况很容易改变。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 "Whatever is stated by American officials is nothing more than boasting." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei on Trump claiming to talk directly with Iranians: It was very clear who the Iranian negotiators were. The American side was also clear. The negotiations in Islamabad were between Speaker Ghalibaf and the Vice President of the United States, mediated by Pakistan. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 “美国官员所说的任何话都不过是吹牛。”伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里（Esmaeil Baghaei）就特朗普声称与伊朗人直接对话一事表示：谁是伊朗谈判代表非常清楚。美方也很清楚。伊斯兰堡的谈判是在卡利巴夫议长和美国副总统之间进行的，由巴基斯坦调解。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson: The opening and closing of the Strait of Hormuz does not happen in cyberspace; Iran determines this matter. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗外交部发言人：霍尔木兹海峡的开放和关闭不是在网络空间发生的；伊朗决定此事。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: Iran’s enriched uranium is as sacred as the country’s soil and will under no circumstances be transferred anywhere.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖里：伊朗的浓缩铀和国家的土地一样神圣，在任何情况下都不会被转移到任何地方。

text: Barak Ravid: Trump stunned Netanyahu by declaring that Israel was “prohibited” from striking Lebanon. Israeli officials, caught off guard, quickly sought clarification.
text_zh: Barak Ravid：特朗普宣布以色列“被禁止”打击黎巴嫩，令内塔尼亚胡感到震惊。以色列官员措手不及，迅速寻求澄清。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Welcome to “Market Manipulation Friday.” Just look at how many ships that were planning to cross the strait turned around. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 欢迎来到“市场操纵星期五”。看看有多少原本计划穿越海峡的船只掉头了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇶 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 The United States announced sanctions against seven commanders of Iran-aligned militia groups accused of planning and directing attacks against U.S. personnel, facilities, and interests in Iraq. The targeted figures are linked to groups including Kata’ib Hizballah, Kata’ib Sayyid Al-Shuhada, Harakat Al-Nujaba, and Asa’ib Ahl Al-Haqq, which Washington says threaten American lives and undermine Iraq’s sovereignty. The following people have been sanctioned: - AL RAMMAHI, Ammar Jasim Kadhim - ALBAKHATRA, Khalid Jameel Abed - ALMOHAMMED, Radhwan Yousif Hameed - HAMZAH, Hasan Dheyab Hamzah - JAYTHOOM, Husham Hashim - MUKHAMIS, Saeed Kadhim SUWAED, Safaa Adnan Jabbar @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 🇮🇶 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 美国宣布对七名伊朗支持的民兵组织指挥官实施制裁，这些人被指控策划和指挥针对美国在伊拉克的人员、设施和利益的袭击。被针对的人物与包括真主党旅（Kata’ib Hizballah）、烈士旅（Kata’ib Sayyid Al-Shuhada）、努贾巴运动（Harakat Al-Nujaba）和正义联盟（Asa’ib Ahl Al-Haqq）在内的组织有关联，华盛顿称这些组织威胁美国人的生命并破坏伊拉克的主权。以下人员受到制裁：- AL RAMMAHI, Ammar Jasim Kadhim - ALBAKHATRA, Khalid Jameel Abed - ALMOHAMMED, Radhwan Yousif Hameed - HAMZAH, Hasan Dheyab Hamzah - JAYTHOOM, Husham Hashim - MUKHAMIS, Saeed Kadhim SUWAED, Safaa Adnan Jabbar @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Iran’s Foreign Ministry says decisions on opening the Strait of Hormuz will be made on the ground, not on the internet, and that Iran is the one calling the shots right now. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗外交部表示，关于开放霍尔木兹海峡的决定将在实地做出，而不是在互联网上，而且目前伊朗才是说了算的一方。推文

text: The Spectator Index US share market has now added over $7.5 trillion in market value since the 30th of March. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 自3月30日以来，美国股市市值已增加超过7.5万亿美元。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: "The possibility of transferring Iran's enriched uranium outside the country is not acceptable." "Compensation for the losses and damages caused to Iran is an important issue in negotiations." "A naval blockade is considered a violation of the ceasefire, and Iran will certainly take the necessary steps in response." "The lifting of sanctions is very important to us, and compensation for the damages caused to the country holds special importance for Iran." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外交部发言人：“将伊朗浓缩铀转移到国外的可能性是不可接受的。”“赔偿伊朗遭受的损失和损害是谈判中的一个重要议题。”“海上封锁被视为违反停火协议，伊朗肯定会采取必要措施进行回应。”“解除制裁对我们非常重要，赔偿该国遭受的损失对伊朗具有特殊重要性。”推文

text: WarMonitor Fmr. Def. Sec. Mark Esper explains how the WH is sending mixed signals in its push to end the conflict it started. The Strait isn’t fully open like it was before the war, Iran is asserting ownership of it by forcing “approved” ships to hug its coast with talk of a toll, while Trump is floating terms similar to the old Iran nuclear deal, including unlocking $20B for Iran. But in a nutshell, no deal has been agreed to as of yet, and the markets just closed, if that tells you anything. @TheWarMonitor Iran has since said that they’ve not said such a thing to Trump, nor have they agreed to hand over the enriched uranium. So it looks like Trump has been telling porkies, or at best negotiating with himself. - 🌍 𝙂𝙡𝙤𝙗𝙖𝙡 🌎 𝘼𝙛𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙨 🌏 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 前国防部长马克·埃斯珀解释了白宫在推动结束其发起的冲突时如何发出相互矛盾的信号。海峡并没有像战前那样完全开放，伊朗通过强迫“获准”的船只贴近其海岸航行并谈论通行费来主张其所有权，而特朗普则提出了类似于旧伊朗核协议的条款，包括为伊朗解冻200亿美元。但简而言之，目前尚未达成任何协议，而且市场刚刚收盘，如果这能说明什么的话。@TheWarMonitor 伊朗此后表示，他们并没有对特朗普说过这样的话，也没有同意移交浓缩铀。所以看起来特朗普一直在撒谎，或者充其量是在自言自语地谈判。- 🌍 𝙂𝙡𝙤𝙗𝙖𝙡 🌎 𝘼𝙛𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧𝙨 🌏 推文

text_zh: The Spectator Index 据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻报道，特朗普称伊朗已同意“停止支持真主党和哈马斯等所有代理人组织”，并已“同意了一切”。推文

text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗外交部表示，将浓缩铀转移到另一个国家的选项是不可接受的。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - FAA selects Palantir, Thales SA and Air Space Intelligence to develop a new AI tool for air traffic control — Bloomberg tweet

text: Open Source Intel Nawaf al-Mousavi, head of Hezbollah's resources and borders portfolio, to Al-Manar: "We will respond in the appropriate way to any Israeli violation of the ceasefire. We will not go back. We will not be silent about assassinations and bombings like before the last campaign. This is not a topic for discussion." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党资源与边境事务负责人纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Mousavi）对灯塔电视台（Al-Manar）表示：“我们将以适当的方式回应任何以色列对停火协议的违反。我们不会退缩。我们不会像上次行动前那样对暗杀和爆炸保持沉默。这不是一个可以讨论的话题。”推文

text: Open Source Intel Meta Platforms plans to begin a first wave of sweeping layoffs on May 20, with additional cuts expected later in the year, Reuters reports, citing sources. The company is expected to reduce about 10% of its global workforce, roughly 8,000 employees, in the initial round. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045228607895720292/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据路透社援引消息人士的话报道，Meta Platforms计划于5月20日开始第一波大规模裁员，预计今年晚些时候还会有进一步的裁员。预计该公司在首轮裁员中将削减约10%的全球员工，即约8,000名员工。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045228607895720292/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News This comes despite Trump claiming that Iran has agreed to transfer the enriched uranium Iranian state broadcaster IRIB, quoting a Foreign Ministry spokesman: The option of transferring Iran's enriched uranium abroad is rejected https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045217833651466690/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 尽管特朗普声称伊朗已同意转移浓缩铀，但伊朗国家广播公司IRIB援引外交部发言人的话称：转移伊朗浓缩铀到国外的选项已被拒绝 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045217833651466690/photo/1 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Open Source Intel A senior American official told the Wall Street Journal that talks with Iran are likely to take place Monday in Pakistan, though no date has been formally set. Trump's negotiating team is on standby. - N12 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一位美国高级官员告诉《华尔街日报》，与伊朗的会谈可能会于周一在巴基斯坦举行，尽管尚未正式确定日期。特朗普的谈判团队处于待命状态。- N12 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷🇺🇸 "Without exaggeration, our people, the defenders of the homeland, each and every Iranian behaved in a way that I think our enemies never imagined. The enemy was left frustrated in the plan they had against our Iran." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei:…" 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 "Iran's enriched uranium is absolutely not supposed to be transferred anywhere. To the same extent that Iranian soil is important and sacred to us, this matter is also important to us. So this is completely rejected." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei on American claims about transferring enriched uranium: The issue of transferring uranium with 20 percent enrichment is not on the table at all. This discussion has never been raised. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷🇺🇸 ”毫不夸张地说，我们的人民，祖国的捍卫者，每一位伊朗人的表现方式我想我们的敌人从未想象过。敌人在他们针对我们伊朗的计划中感到沮丧。“伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）：……” 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 “伊朗的浓缩铀绝对不会被转移到任何地方。正如伊朗的土地对我们来说是重要且神圣的一样，这个问题对我们来说也很重要。所以这是完全被拒绝的。”伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就美国关于转移浓缩铀的说法表示：转移20%丰度浓缩铀的问题根本不在讨论范围内。这个话题从未被提出过。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Axios: A U.S. official clarifies Trump's Lebanon comments: “The President’s ceasefire agreement between Lebanon and Israel clearly states that Israel will not carry out any offensive military operations against Lebanese targets but preserves its…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Axios : U.S. President Trump’s post declaring that Israel is “prohibited” from bombing Lebanon and that “enough is enough” caught Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and his advisers by surprise. The post contradicted the US‑brokered ceasefire agreement, which preserves Israel’s right to self‑defence against planned or ongoing attacks. After Israel asked for clarifications, a US official confirmed that the ceasefire prohibits offensive military operations but does not restrict self‑defence. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 Axios：一位美国官员澄清了特朗普关于黎巴嫩的言论：‘总统在黎巴嫩和以色列之间达成的停火协议明确规定，以色列不会对黎巴嫩目标进行任何进攻性军事行动，但保留其……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Axios：美国总统特朗普发帖称以色列“被禁止”轰炸黎巴嫩且“受够了”，这让以色列总理内塔尼亚胡及其顾问感到意外。该帖文与美国斡旋的停火协议相矛盾，该协议保留了以色列针对计划中或正在进行的袭击进行自卫的权利。在以色列要求澄清后，一位美国官员证实，停火协议禁止进攻性军事行动，但不限制自卫。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 NPR: A senior Hezbollah field commander, using the nom de guerre Jihad, stated that the group has adopted a new decentralised command structure under leader Naim Qassem. Fighters are divided into semi‑autonomous units that do not communicate with…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah official Nawaf al‑Moussawi, responsible for resources and borders, said the group will respond “in its own appropriate way” to any Israeli ceasefire violation. “We will not go back, we will not remain silent about assassinations and bombings as before the campaign – this is not up for discussion,” he stated. Moussawi warned that if Lebanese President Joseph Aoun meets Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, he would lose his status as president. He also revealed that Hezbollah has changed its operational methods, with some communication now conducted via carrier pigeons. “For every senior Hezbollah commander who is eliminated, there are two replacements – this does not harm the fighting,” he said. He praised leader Naim Qassem, saying he has become a father figure for the group’s fighters. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 NPR：一位使用化名‘圣战’（Jihad）的真主党高级战地指挥官表示，该组织在领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）的领导下采用了新的去中心化指挥结构。战斗人员被分为半自治单位，彼此之间不进行通信……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 负责资源和边境事务的真主党官员纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Moussawi）表示，该组织将以“其自身适当的方式”回应任何以色列违反停火协议的行为。他表示：“我们不会走回头路，我们不会像战前那样对暗杀和轰炸保持沉默——这一点没得商量。”穆萨维警告说，如果黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）会见以色列总理内塔尼亚胡，他将失去总统地位。他还透露，真主党改变了作战方式，部分通信现在通过信鸽进行。他说：“每消灭一名真主党高级指挥官，就会有两名继任者——这不会损害战斗力。”他称赞领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆，称他已成为该组织战士们的父亲般的人物。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇶 An explosion in Erbil, Iraq! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇶 伊拉克埃尔比勒发生爆炸！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇱🇮🇷 London’s Kensington Gardens has been closed after police discovered a number of discarded items near the Israeli embassy. Officers wearing protective clothing are on scene. A video circulated online by the Iran‑linked group Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The Soufan Center : The US‑Israeli war against Iran is amplifying "terrorism" risks across Europe, with Iran‑linked actors using deniable, low‑cost attacks on Jewish communities and US‑linked assets. Since late February, incidents include synagogue explosions in Liège and Rotterdam, a bomb near the U.S. embassy in Oslo, a foiled Bank of America plot in Paris, and arson on Jewish ambulances in London. A group calling itself Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia (HAYI) has claimed many of these attacks; European officials suspect it may be a front created by Iranian intelligence. Iran’s hybrid tactics blur terrorism, criminality and statecraft, complicating attribution and counterterrorism responses. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧🇮🇱🇮🇷 伦敦肯辛顿花园在警方发现以色列大使馆附近有若干废弃物品后被关闭。身穿防护服的警官正在现场。一个与伊朗有关联的组织 Harakat Ashab al-Yamin 在网上发布了一段视频……” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 苏凡中心（The Soufan Center）：美以针对伊朗的战争正在加剧欧洲各地的“恐怖主义”风险，与伊朗有关联的行动者正在利用可否认的、低成本的袭击手段针对犹太社区和与美国有关联的资产。自二月底以来，发生的事件包括列日和鹿特丹的犹太教堂爆炸案、奥斯陆美国大使馆附近的炸弹事件、巴黎针对美国银行的阴谋被挫败，以及伦敦犹太救护车纵火案。一个自称“伊斯兰右翼运动”（Harakat Ashab al-Yamin al-Islamia，简称 HAYI）的组织声称对其中许多袭击负责；欧洲官员怀疑这可能是伊朗情报部门设立的幌子。伊朗的混合战术模糊了恐怖主义、犯罪和国家行为之间的界限，使归因和反恐应对变得复杂化。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 London’s Kensington Gardens has been closed after police discovered a number of discarded items near the Israeli embassy. Officers wearing protective clothing are on scene. A video circulated online by the Iran‑linked group Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia claims it targeted the embassy with two drones carrying “radioactive and dangerous carcinogenic materials”. Police have confirmed the embassy was not attacked and staff are safe. Counter‑terrorism officers are investigating the video’s authenticity and any link to the discarded items. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 伦敦肯辛顿花园在警方发现以色列大使馆附近有若干废弃物品后被关闭。身穿防护服的警官正在现场。一个与伊朗有关联的组织“伊斯兰右翼运动”（Harakat Ashab al-Yamin al-Islamia）在网上发布视频，声称用两架携带“放射性和危险致癌物质”的无人机袭击了大使馆。警方已证实大使馆未受攻击，工作人员安全。反恐警官正在调查视频的真实性以及其与废弃物品的任何联系。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸🇮🇷 During a phone interview with CBS News, Trump said the U.S. has not agreed to give Iran any money in exchange for its enriched uranium, saying, “No, we are not paying 10 cents.” He also said the U.S. would work with Iran to recover the material and transport…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump told CBS that Iran agreed to stop funding Hezbollah and Hamas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸🇮🇷 在接受哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻的电话采访时，特朗普表示美国并未同意向伊朗提供任何资金以换取其浓缩铀，并称：‘不，我们不会支付一毛钱。’他还表示，美国将与伊朗合作回收这些材料并运输……” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普告诉 CBS，伊朗已同意停止资助真主党和哈马斯。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 During a phone interview with CBS News, Trump said the U.S. has not agreed to give Iran any money in exchange for its enriched uranium, saying, “No, we are not paying 10 cents.” He also said the U.S. would work with Iran to recover the material and transport it to the United States. “Our people, together with the Iranians, are going to work together to go get it. And then we’ll take it to the United States,” he said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在接受哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻的电话采访时，特朗普表示，美国并未同意向伊朗支付任何金钱以换取其浓缩铀，并称：“不，我们不会支付一毛钱。”他还表示，美国将与伊朗合作回收这些材料并将其运往美国。他说：“我们的人员将与伊朗人一起合作去取回它。然后我们会把它带到美国。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷🚢 Select ships are transiting the Strait of Hormuz. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 There are reports of numerous ships turning around and heading back towards the Persian Gulf. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷🚢 部分船只正在通过霍尔木兹海峡。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 有报道称，许多船只正在掉头返回波斯湾。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel A Lebanese man returned to his village in southern Lebanon. Hezbollah flags everywhere. Iranian flags everywhere. Not a single Lebanese flag. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045224693737701834/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）一名黎巴嫩男子回到了他在黎巴嫩南部的村庄。到处都是真主党的旗帜。到处都是伊朗的旗帜。没有一面黎巴嫩国旗。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045224693737701834/video/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesperson: The opening and closing of the Strait of Hormuz does not happen in cyberspace; Iran is the one who determines this. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗外交部发言人：霍尔木兹海峡的开闭不是在网络空间发生的；决定权在伊朗手中。推文

text: WarMonitor The strait that was open before the war is still effectively closed. Ships that began heading toward it are now turning back. Start of toll collection from ships in the Strait of Hormuz by Iran Iranian MP Nabavian: With the U.S. backing down and accepting a ceasefire in Lebanon, Iran will allow certain commercial vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz after collecting tolls. https://twitter.com/IranMilitaryEN/status/2045174625894551737/photo/1 - Iran Military News ☫ tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 战前开放的海峡目前实际上仍处于关闭状态。开始驶向该海峡的船只现在正在掉头。伊朗开始对霍尔木兹海峡的船只征收通行费。伊朗议员纳巴维安（Nabavian）：随着美国退让并接受黎巴嫩停火，伊朗将在收取通行费后允许部分商船通过霍尔木兹海峡。https://twitter.com/IranMilitaryEN/status/2045174625894551737/photo/1 - 伊朗军事新闻 ☫ 推文

text: OSINTdefender During an interview earlier with CBS News, President Trump said that Iran has agreed to stop backing proxy terrorist groups across the Middle East, like Hamas, Hezbollah, and the Houthis. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在早些时候接受哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻采访时，特朗普总统表示，伊朗已同意停止支持中东各地的代理人恐怖组织，如哈马斯、真主党和胡塞武装。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Donald Trump told CBS that removing Iran’s enriched uranium would not require U.S. ground troops. 🗣️ “No troops. We’ll go down and get it with them, and then we’ll take it. We’ll be getting it together because by that time we’ll have an agreement, and there’s no need for fighting when there’s an agreement. That’s better. We would have done it the other way if we had to.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普总统告诉哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS），移除伊朗的浓缩铀不需要美国地面部队。🗣️ “没有军队。我们将和他们一起去取，然后我们会把它带走。我们将共同完成，因为到那时我们已经达成了协议，有协议在就不需要战斗。那样更好。如果必须的话，我们本可以采取另一种方式。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 BREAKING | Iranian foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said that enriched uranium is as sacred as the country’s soil and will never be transferred anywhere. “The issue of transferring 60% enriched uranium is being raised. This has not been presented as an option by our side—that Iran's enriched uranium should be transferred to the United States. Various options exist regarding a settlement for the issues that are considered part of our nuclear file." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 快讯 | 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）表示，浓缩铀和国家的土地一样神圣，绝不会转移到任何地方。“关于转移60%浓缩铀的问题被提了出来。这并不是我们提出的选项——即伊朗的浓缩铀应该转移到美国。关于解决被视为我们核档案一部分的问题，存在多种选择。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump said in a phone interview this morning with CBS News that Iran has “agreed to everything,” and will work with the United States to remove its buried stockpile of highly-enriched uranium, though he insisted that U.S. troops would not be deployed onto the ground in Iran. “No. No troops,” Trump said. “We'll go down and get it with them, and then we'll take it. We'll be getting it together because by that time, we'll have an agreement and there's no need for fighting when there's an agreement. Nice right? That's better. We would have done it the other way if we had to.” The President then stated that the material would be brought back to the U.S. once it was recovered, “Our people, together with the Iranians, are going to work together to go get it. And then we'll take it to the United States.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普今天早上在接受哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）新闻的电话采访时表示，伊朗已“同意了一切”，并将与美国合作移除其埋藏的高浓缩铀库存，但他坚称美国军队不会被部署到伊朗地面。特朗普说：“不。没有军队。我们将和他们一起去取，然后我们会把它带走。我们将共同完成，因为到那时我们已经达成了协议，有协议在就不需要战斗。不错吧？那样更好。如果必须的话，我们本可以采取另一种方式。” 总统随后表示，材料一旦回收，将被带回美国，“我们的人员将与伊朗人一起合作去取回它。然后我们会把它带到美国。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Missed this note from Zelensky: "The nature and consequences of recent events in Venezuela should deter the leadership of Belarus from making mistakes." 🇺🇦 🇧🇾 Ukrainian intelligence reported to President Zelensky about the construction of roads and preparation of artillery positions on the Belarusian side of the border with Ukraine. "We believe that Russia will once again try to draw Belarus into its war. I instructed the relevant channels to warn the de facto leadership of Belarus about Ukraine's readiness to defend its land and independence," Zelensky said. /18718 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 错过了泽连斯基的这条信息：“委内瑞拉近期事件的性质和后果应该阻止白俄罗斯领导层犯错。” 🇺🇦 🇧🇾 乌克兰情报部门向泽连斯基总统报告了白俄罗斯在与乌克兰边境一侧修建道路和准备炮兵阵地的情况。“我们认为俄罗斯将再次试图将白俄罗斯拖入其战争。我指示相关渠道警告白俄罗斯的事实上的领导层，乌克兰已做好保卫其土地和独立的准备，” 泽连斯基说。/18718 - Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷🇺🇸 "The framework of the ceasefire understanding is clear. It was two weeks. Until now, we have had no discussion about extension." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei on whether the Strait will automatically close again if the other side breaks commitments:…" 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 "Without exaggeration, our people, the defenders of the homeland, each and every Iranian behaved in a way that I think our enemies never imagined. The enemy was left frustrated in the plan they had against our Iran." Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei: For us, this ceasefire is a platform for the complete cessation of war, and in fact, freeing our country from the shadow of war. The repetition of events that started about a year ago is not acceptable to us. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷🇺🇸 ‘停火谅解的框架很明确。是两周。到目前为止，我们还没有讨论过延期问题。’ 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊（Esmaeil Baghaei）在被问及如果对方违反承诺，海峡是否会自动再次关闭时表示：……” 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 “毫不夸张地说，我们的人民，祖国的捍卫者，每一位伊朗人的表现，我想我们的敌人从未想象过。敌人在针对我们伊朗的计划中感到沮丧。” 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：对我们来说，这次停火是彻底停止战争的平台，实际上是让我们国家摆脱战争阴影。大约一年前开始的事件的重演对我们来说是不可接受的。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump states to CBS that Iran has agreed to everything, absolutely everything, and this will be a great deal. Specifically, according to Trump, Iran will stop uranium enrichment, and at the same time, American specialists will enter Iran and remove the enriched uranium. At the same time, Trump notes that Iran has agreed to stop supporting proxy forces, Hezbollah and Hamas. tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普向哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）声明，伊朗已同意一切，绝对是一切，这将是一笔伟大的交易。具体而言，据特朗普称，伊朗将停止铀浓缩，同时美国专家将进入伊朗并移除浓缩铀。同时，特朗普指出，伊朗已同意停止支持代理人势力，即真主党和哈马斯。推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan says it is "willing to go to all lengths" to help secure a permanent U.S.-Iran peace deal. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）巴基斯坦表示“愿意竭尽全力”帮助确保达成永久性的美伊和平协议。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iran's enriched uranium is "as sacred to us as the soil of Iran and will not be transferred anywhere under any circumstances," declares Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman — Tasnim tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @byjepstein : New satellite imagery collected today shows the aftermath of Ukrainian drone strikes on the Russian oil facility at Tuapse on the Black Sea. ( 📸 : @vantortech ) https://twitter.com/byjepstein/status/2044875985661628455/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @byjepstein：今天收集的最新卫星图像显示了乌克兰无人机袭击黑海图阿普谢（Tuapse）俄罗斯石油设施后的后果。（ 📸 : @vantortech ）https://twitter.com/byjepstein/status/2044875985661628455/photo/1 推文
